chapter_title.en: Miracles of the Master of the time during his Occultation

text: 240- وبهذا الاسناد، عن الحسن بن الفضل بن يزيد اليماني قال:كتبت في معنيين وأردت أن أكتب في الثالث وامتنعت منه مخافة أن يكره ذلك، فورد جواب المعنيين والثالث الذي طويته مفسرا.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 240 - It is narrated from the same chains from Hasan Ibn Fadhl bin Zaid Yamani that he says: “I wrote a letter about two issues and wanted to write about a third issue as well, but did not, fearing he will not like it. The answer came, explaining the two issues and the third, which I had kept to myself.”
